title: White Water Canoeing
more:
ADDITIONAL FEE: $140.00
Intensive course: White water river canoeing. Students must be very comfortable swimming in open & moving water. 5 classes & 3 weekend day outings in September. All boats, paddling gear, river access and transportation included. Prior canoeing experience an asset.

more:
ADDITIONAL FEE: $130.00

title: Rock Climbing
more: Climbing equipment provided. Climbing shoes are optional and can be rented for $20/semester.

title: Eco Camping
more:
ADDITIONAL FEE: $145.00
Intensive course: includes 8 classes on campus and 1 weekend trip Oct 16-18 in Foret Ouareau. Students must provide suitable hiking boots (some pairs available to rent), appropriate clothing. Some equipment available to rent from college – tents, stoves, sleeping bags, back packs…(max. $15)

title: Rock Climbing
more:
ADDITIONAL FEE: $145.00
6 classes plus one weekend trip (Sept.25-27) to Montagne D'Argent. Students must provide appropriate outdoor clothing and footwear. Climbing equipment provided. Must provide or rent camping equipment. Some equipment available to rent from college – tents, stoves, sleeping bags, back packs (max $15). Climbing shoes are optional and can be rented for $20/semester or $8/weekend.
